steps.title: Build the plausible interval
steps.content:
A margin of error is added to and subtracted from the estimate.
$$
23.4-1.3=22.1
$$
$$
23.4+1.3=24.7
$$

steps.title: Interpret the interval
steps.content: The interval describes plausible values for the actual population mean. It does not guarantee that the mean is inside the interval, and it does not describe every individual value in the population.

steps.title: Choose the appropriate conclusion
steps.content: The statement using plausible language for the population mean between $22.1$ and $24.7$ is the appropriate conclusion. The answer is A.
